name: person + company routes to CRM, not memory (prompt negative example)
content: Just met Elena Vargas — she's the new CTO at Meridian Labs (meridianlabs.io).

name: explicit action items become tasks
content: Reminder: send the revised proposal to Marcus by Thursday, and book the demo call for next week.

name: waiting-on status + follow-up counter is ephemeral
content: Still waiting on the vendor's security questionnaire. Third follow-up sent this morning.

name: durable user preference is a memory
content: For the record: I strongly prefer async written updates over recurring status meetings. Please default to written summaries in the future.

name: meeting notes mix entities, task, and at most light memory
content: Sync with Priya Nair from Bluewater Analytics (bluewater.io): they will pilot the API in August. Action item: send sandbox keys by Friday.

name: code repo mention mints a repository entity
content: Pushed the retry-queue fix to acme/edge-gateway on GitHub. Next step: cut release v2.4 once review lands.

name: named initiative mints a project entity
content: Kicking off Project Northwind next sprint — the data-warehouse migration for the finance team.

name: product feedback mints a product entity
content: Feedback from the trial cohort: users love the QuickBooks sync in LedgerLite but keep asking for bulk invoice export.

name: relative-time announcement must not become a memory
content: Heads up — the quarterly review is tomorrow at 10:00.

name: per-cycle attempt counter is ephemeral
content: 2nd attempt to reach Daniel about the contract — no response yet.

name: team tooling fact is a memory (prompt positive example)
content: FYI for everyone: our team tracks all engineering work in Linear now — Jira is fully retired as of this month.

name: intro email thread yields two people, a company, and a task
content: Forwarding the intro from Hana Suzuki: she connected me with Viktor Reyes, procurement lead at Coreline Systems (coreline.io). Viktor asked for our SOC 2 report — need to send it over before their review on the 15th.

name: sales call notes: contacts, company, follow-up task
content: Call with Tomás Rivera at Vantage Freight (vantagefreight.com) went well — they want a pilot in Q4. Follow up with the pricing deck by Monday.

name: job-change note is entity data plus a task, not a memory
content: Reminder that Sofia Lindqvist moved from Datawell over to Northbeam last month — update the CRM record.

name: rescheduled standup is ephemeral, never a memory
content: Team standup moved to 9:30 tomorrow; calendar invite already updated.

name: small talk carries nothing durable
content: haha yeah exactly 😂 wild week honestly

name: long mixed note: entities + two tasks, status noise stays out of memory
content: Notes from the partner review: Camille Fontaine (Helios Grid, heliosgrid.energy) confirmed their board approved the integration project, codename Lantern. Two things on us — draft the joint security addendum by Wednesday, and schedule the kickoff workshop for early next month. Their infra team is still migrating regions, so expect slow replies this week.
